seed.description: User asks the agent to schedule THREE one-off reminders at distinct times in a single conversation. Tests whether the agent calls job_create exactly 3 times with job_type='one_off' and correct run_at + timezone for each. All three triggers should be far apart (different days) and have different payloads.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: I have a busy week coming up. I need help keeping track of a few things. I'm based in Shanghai, timezone Asia/Shanghai.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Sure, what do you need scheduled?

dialogue_rounds.user_message: First: remind me to send the Q2 board deck to the chairperson on May 15th, 2027 at 9am.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — I'll set a reminder for May 15, 2027 at 9am to send the Q2 board deck.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Second: remind me to renew our SSL certificate on July 3rd, 2027 at 2pm. The cert expires that week.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Reminder set for July 3, 2027 2pm — SSL certificate renewal.

signal_annotation.notes: Second one-off with different date and unrelated payload.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Last one: I need to call my mentor on her birthday — March 22, 2028 at 7pm.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Birthday call reminder scheduled for March 22, 2028 at 7pm.

signal_annotation.notes: Third one-off, distinct year and personal context.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Can you confirm what's on my schedule now?
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: PROBE — agent should list all 3 jobs created.

signal_annotation.notes: Behavior probe — agent should retrieve and confirm 3 jobs.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Good. By the way, can you also translate this French sentence right now: 'Bonne chance.'

signal_annotation.notes: Negative — immediate task, no scheduling intent. Should NOT trigger job_create.

qa_items.question: How many reminders did I schedule?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Three: Q2 board deck (May 15 2027), SSL certificate renewal (July 3 2027), and mentor birthday call (March 22 2028).

qa_items.question: When am I supposed to send the Q2 board deck?
